title: Japanese Omelette
description: A simple Japanese-style omelette made with eggs and a variety of seasonings.

ingredients.name: Japanese stir-fry sauce
ingredients.notes: Available at most Asian grocery stores

instructions: 1. In a small bowl, whisk together the beaten eggs, Japanese stir-fry sauce, and soy sauce.
2. Heat a small non-stick pan over medium heat.
3. Brush the pan with sesame oil.
4. Pour in the egg mixture and cook until the edges start to set.
5. Use a spatula to gently lift and fold the edges of the omelette towards the center.
6. Continue cooking and folding until the eggs are almost set.
7. Use the spatula to carefully fold the omelette in half.
8. Cook for an additional 30 seconds to 1 minute.
9. Slide the omelette out of the pan onto a plate.
10. Garnish with chopped green onions and serve hot.
